channel.title: Grubby Website on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Grubby Website on RaihnForge

item.title: Team Web Building
item.description:
Most of the websites I’ve ever worked on have been with Teams across the Globe.  The client in Europe must have his intent fulfilled.  The Web coder in California must understand some of the subtlety of design.  The artist must uphold the integrity of the design.

Here is a snippet of interaction during a web development cycle.  This is the first iteration of Grubby’s website.  The Photo Gallery was coming along nicely, but needed some extra attention, ensuring the code would reflect the initial design.
